title: Iodine and iodized salt in pregnancy
excerpt: Iodine supports thyroid function and fetal brain development — food sources and supplement cautions per WHO.
content:
## Role of iodine

Needed for maternal thyroid hormones and fetal neurodevelopment. Deficiency still occurs in some regions.

## Sources

- Iodized table salt (muối i-ốt) in cooking — moderate use.
- Fish, dairy, eggs.
- Prenatal vitamins may include iodine — check labels.

## Notes

- Do not exceed recommended intake; excess iodine also harms.
- Sea salt without iodine may not provide iodine unless labeled.
